Поставить настил для Ульфы: Set up a bed for Ulfa
Ну вот, ты можешь пока разместиться здес:
Well, you can settle here for now. 
Merigold said you only needed rest. Hope, she's right.
(Какая она смирная, хм. Не понятно тольк:
(Hm, she's so docile. 
I just have no idea who she is or how I should call her).
(“Эй, собачка” не пойдет, “эй, волчица”:
( I can't call her dog, can't address her as wolf, because that 
would be weird. Maybe I should give her a name?)
Эй! Может мне тебе имя дать?: Hey! Do you want me to give you a name?
She looks at you with distrust.
Ну брось! Мне надо же как-то к тебе обра: Oh, come on! I have to call you somehow!
I know. I will call you...
\\N[3] приподняла голову, словно хотела:
\N[3] lifts her head as if wanting to object, but then sniffs and 
lies down.
Меня не отпускает мысль, что ты не прост:
I can't stop thinking that you may be more than just an animal. 
And there's only one way to find out.
Нужно выудить у Мэригольд то обращающее:
I need to get that potion from Merigold. 
Of course, she wouldn't just give it to me willingly.
Стоит поговорить с ней. Только аккуратно: I need to talk to her. But very carefully.
I don't want to sleep yet. I still have a lot to do.
Вы замечаете на полу книгу \"Простые сов:
You notice the book "Simple Gardening Tips for Beginners" 
on the floor.
Ха! Не знал, что Мэригольд увлекается ещ: Ha! Didn't know Merigold was also into gardening!
Полистав книгу, ты обнаружил на полях ог:
As you leaf through the book, you find the many notes 
Merigold left in the margins.
Где-то она спорила с автором, где-то доп:
Here and there, you see names of alchemical substances that 
can only be obtained from a few laboratories in the whole world.
Хм... Кажется это не такие уж \"простые:
Hm... These tips are not so "simple." 
It’s worth a read when I have nothing else to do.
Ты достаешь из подсумка колбу с зельем т:
You take out the vial with the transformation potion from the 
pouch. 
Ulfa feels unsafe and starts to back off.
Да, так и без пальцев остаться можно!: I could lose my fingers like this!
Hrmph, fine. I'll pour it in the bowl.
I see, I can't trick you.
Ну что ты смотришь? Не травить же я тебя:
Why are you looking like that? 
I'm not going to poison you, you know.
В худшем случае тебе от этого зелья ниче:
Worst case, nothing will happen. 
But if I was right about you...
Ты видела Мэригольд? Вот будешь как она,:
Have you seen Merigold? You'll be just like her. 
Only she's a fox and you'll be a dog.
И не начинай! Волк, собака... это почти:
And don't you start again! Wolf, dog... it's almost the same 
species, did you know that?
Ладно. Наверное, я все выдумал, и никака:
Fine. I must have thought this all wrong. 
You're not a "sleeping" anything, you're just normal.
Кажется, я пристал к тебе с этим зельем:
I must have been so hell-bent on giving this potion to you, 
because I desperately need a friend.
Знаешь, я вообще не с этого острова, я п: You know, I'm not even from this island. I was on a ship...
Ты провел с Ульфой еще какое-то время. Е:
You've spent with Ulfa some time. 
Now she likes you a bit more.
Уже поздно, а я все болтаю. Давай, не ск: It's late and I'm still babbling. Well, have a good time.
Оставив миску, наполненную зельем, рядом: You leave the bowl with the potion with Ulfa and go to bed.
Дверь открыта нараспашку... И где Ульфа!: The door is wide open... Where is Ulfa?
Must have run away I need to find her immediately.
(Без зелья ничего не получиться... Нужно: (It won’t work without the potion... Need to stop by Meri!)
Чем волки лучше собак?: How are wolves better than dogs?
Ха! Спрашиваешь! Волки свободные! Они са:
Ha! Can't believe you're asking me that! 
Wolves are free! They find their own food and they answer to 
no one!
Ни от кого? Ну, не знаю. Волки стайные,:
No one? I don't know. 
Wolves live in packs, they have leaders and a strict hierarchy.
Они знают, что охотясь стаей, они еще см:
Also, when they hunt in packs, they are even deadlier! 
That's because they are very smart too!
Ха! Да они постоянно бросаются на меня,:
Ha! 
They keep coming at me and they get a beating every time. 
So, not so smart after all.
Тебе не понять! Волки не могут отступить:
You can't understand this! 
Wolves are too proud to walk away!
Не злись. Мы же просто болтаем!: Don't get mad. We're just talking!
Так ты получается, тоже волк?: So, that means, you're a wolf too?
Looks like half doesn't cut it.
Как я понял, до того, как ты оказалась в:
As I understand, you had a different life before you found 
yourself in the forest. Where are you from?
До того, как я пришла в лес, у меня не б: I had no life before I came to the forest. Just a kennel.
Днями напролет я скучала. Каждое утро пр:
I was bored all the time. 
Every morning, I would watch my neighbor and wonder why they 
would take the same path to go fishing.
In the evening, I would wait for my master to give me scraps.
Я тоже, когда был еще совсем подростком:
When I was much younger, I decided to leave everything 
and everyone behind. At night, I sneaked into a ship...
Кстати, другие матросы тоже меня не сраз:
By the way, the other sailors didn't just let me join them at 
once!
Я просто хотел сказать, что, ну... не ст:
I just wanted to say that... you shouldn't worry too much. 
After all, you won't be bored with me!
Неплохо выглядишь... Этакий дикарский на:
You look nice-ish... It's like something savages would wear. 
Did you make it by yourself?
Охотники всегда могут сделать что-то под:
Hunters may always make something like this by skinning 
their prey. You have nothing here, so I had to improvise.
Шкуры? А мне показалось, что это местная: Skins? I thought this was a curtain.
Как ты себя чувствуешь? Если хочешь, мож: How are you feeling? We could talk, if you wish...
Тебе нельзя замыкатся в себе!: You can't just shut yourself off from the whole world!
Ну почему же? Я всегда прекрасно с этим: Why not? I always handled that quite well.
Doesn't look like it helped you.
Думаешь, от разговор с тобой мне полегча: You think that talking to you will make me feel better, that it?
Знаешь, что бы мне сейчас помогло?: You know what would actually help me now?
Надо же. Возможно, это первая дверь в ее: Yikes. That's the first door in her life and she slams it like that.
Нет, серьезно! Она постоянно срывается н:
No, seriously! 
She constantly snaps at me, whereas I did nothing wrong...
С другой стороны, она кажется такой запу: Then again, she looks so lost...
Может, сейчас с ней нужно немного полегч: Maybe I should take it easy on her for now?
It's fine. We can go for a walk tomorrow.
Вы провели с Ульфой какое-то время. Возм:
You've spent a little more time with Ulfa. 
Now you may be even closer.
Она указала рукой в направление камышей,:
She points towards the reeds. 
Little ducklings swim from behind the rushes after mother duck.
(Да, и правда очень мило. Она улыбалась:
(They are actually very cute. 
She smiled how many times... two or so? 
She looks nice when she smiles. She's very...)
(... я почти не обращал на это внимания,: (...I haven't noticed this before, but she's actually very cute...)
Слушай, я... Мне кажется, я не совсем пр:
Listen, I... I think I wasn't being very... 
I just wanted to say that I may be a bit too distant, but...
Ох, брось. Это все ваши \"волчьи штучки\:
Oh, come on. It's all your "wolf tricks". 
I don't worry about such things.
No, it's not a wolf trick, it's...
Да-да, волки умные, сильные и безумно се: Yes-yes, wolves are smart, strong and very sexy!
Держу пари, что длинными вечерам ты прос:
I bet you spend long nights dreaming of a big strong wolf, 
who'd come to you and...
Что? Откуда... С чего ты взял!: What? How... Why would you think that?
Ah, don't care. Think what you want.
Поздравляем с успешным прохождением демо:
Congratulations on successfully completing the demo! 
To continue visit our page on patreon) * Link to page*
Это и правда книга про уход за садом и о:
This is really a book on gardening – and it’s terribly boring. 
However, Merigold's notes in the margins catch your interest.
Она работала над тем, чтобы наделить поч:
She was working on endowing the soil with alchemical power, 
so that everything that grew in it had magical effects. 
If I am to believe these records, she did it.
Глава с I по VI “простых советов” подроб:
Chapters I through VI of “Simple Tips” tell in detail about 
sowing different crops - plowing, drawing up, and the like.
Поля здесь почти пустые, бросается в гла:
The margins here are almost empty, only one poignant note is 
worth my attention. It reads, “Well, this is if you have an ordinary 
vegetable garden. I can just stick the seed in the ground.”
Глава с VII по XV повествуют о поливе и:
Chapters VII through XV tell about watering and caring for plants. 
It looks like it was hard for the alchemist – so much writing, a 
huge number of failed experiments and half results.
В конце вердикт: “В момент посева необхо:
At the end is the verdict, "At the time of sowing, you need to 
water them to start the reaction."
Глава с XVI по XX. Когда сажать, когда с:
Chapter XVI through XX. When to plant, when to harvest. 
Merigold made it possible that you didn’t have to wait for 
months to harvest. In her garden, most of the plants mature 
in a few days.
Алхимические свойства будущего растения:
The alchemical properties of the future plant depend on 
what exactly you have planted. The effect can be corrected by 
adding fertilizer.
Надеюсь, это очередной кулинарный экспер: I hope this is another culinary experiment, not a fire.
dialogs_eirik_home_Грррав! Я сказала не: Grr-rawr! Told you I won't let you in!!!
dialogs_eirik_home_В каком смысле не пус: How come you won't, this is my previous home, by the way!
dialogs_eirik_home_С ума сойти! Мне к не: That's crazy! I can't come to her, but she can do all she wants!
dialogs_eirik_home_Как будто я рада быть: As if I am happy to be here!
dialogs_eirik_home_Хватит, умоляю! Мэри,: Stop, I'm begging you! Meri, what did you want?
dialogs_eirik_home_Собирайся, нам нужно: Get ready, we need to move.
dialogs_eirik_home_У нас получилось! Зел: We did it! The potion worked, and we saved lots of tadpoles!
dialogs_eirik_home_Супер... А куда собир: Splendid... Where are we moving to?
dialogs_eirik_home_Что?! К лягушкам? Ни: What?! The frogs? No way, I barely made it out alive!
dialogs_eirik_home_Вождь лично гарантиро: The leader swore on your safety personally.
dialogs_eirik_home_Слушай, у лягушек при:
Look, frog folks deliver on theit promises.
If that's the leader who promised...
dialogs_eirik_home_Эйрик, на тебя там му: Eirik, not a hair will fall from your head!
dialogs_eirik_home_Я... Я не понимаю, за: I... I don't get it, why would they need me?
dialogs_eirik_home_Ну я и сказала им кто: Well I told them how you helped rid their settlement of the illness.
dialogs_eirik_home_Да брось, неужели ты:
Don't be shy, why aren't you eager to have the award 
well-deserved?
dialogs_eirik_home_Ну конечно! Ты сделал:
Well, of cource! You did a great thing! 
Get ready now, we cannot be late for long!
dialogs_eirik_home_М-да... Дом и правда: Well... The house really is in a terrible condition.
dialogs_eirik_home_Может хоть немного на: Maybe I can tidy up a bit here? Let's see...
dialogs_eirik_home_А! На что я наступил?: Аh! What did I step on?!
dialogs_eirik_home_Ладно. Думаю, чтобы з:
Okay. I think to start working on the house, 
I'll need to clear up a bit of workspace for myself.
dialogs_eirik_home_Дьявол! Спина затекла: Damn! My back is killing me!
dialogs_eirik_home_Дом давно стоит забро:
The house has been abandoned for a long time, and it's in bad 
condition now. Use the Workbench to raise the Comfort level to 3! 
You'll be able to rest and get your first sleep buff in the house.
You'll need resources for this.
dialogs_eirik_home_Исследуйте местность:
Explore the area for nearby wood and stone. 
Use the 'craft resources' window to create the necessary 
resources (for example, make boards from wood). Good luck!
dialogs_eirik_home_Может я смогу найти с: Maybe I can find building materials somewhere in the house?
dialogs_eirik_home_Вы должны установить: You have to set up a Workbench.
dialogs_eirik_home_С этого момента вы мо:
From now on, you can improve your house using the Workbench! 
Some upgrades can be very useful. For example, now you have 
the opportunity to build a Workshop where you can create 
weapons and armor.
dialogs_eirik_home_Другие улучшения повы:
Other upgrades will enhance the quality of life for you and your 
future companions.
dialogs_eirik_home_Это выражается в Уров:
This is reflected in Comfort Levels. 
Depending on the Comfort Level, you will receive useful buffs 
after each sleep in the house. Moreover, in the future, some
unique scenes with companions will be associated with this.
dialogs_eirik_home_Вы привели дом в поря: You've put the house in order! The quest is completed!
Эйрик(обычное лицо)_Не такой уж и большо:
It's not that big. The hall where Ulfa lives, my room upstairs,
and that's it!
Эйрик(обычное лицо)_Даже не знаю, где те:
I don't even know where to put you. Do you mind sharing the
common room with Ulfa?
Рокси (стыд)_Я думаю, ей нужно будет лич: I think she'll need her own space.
Эйрик(обычное лицо)_Не бойся Ульфу, она: Don't be afraid of Ulfa, she's friendly!
Рокси(обычное лицо)_Я думаю, и мне нужно: I think I'll need my own space too!
Эйрик (досада)_Ох, ну... Тогда остается: Oh, well... That leaves us with the basement.
Рокси(обычное лицо)_Какой подвал? В смыс: What basement? You mean, a real basement here?
Рокси(обычное лицо)_У лягушек, например,:
Frogs, for example, don't have real basements. 
Because it's slough.
Рокси(обычное лицо)_То что они называют:
What they call basement is just the space between the ground
and the floorboards...
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Я понял тебя. Нет,:
I get it. Of course it's a real basement! It has a stone foundation, 
you can stand up straight in there...
Рокси(обычное лицо)_Это прекрасно, я люб: That's wonderful too, I like the shade!
Рокси(обычное лицо)_Нет, серьезно, я сов:
No, seriously, I don't mind the basement at all, it's great! 
I dreamed of being to a real basement when I was a mouse!
Рокси(обычное лицо)_Говорят, что там все:
They say you can always hide there, the owners store
grain, food and stuff there!
Рокси (стыд)_Я не к тому, что я буду вор: I don't mean that I'll steal your food...
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_Я понял, хорошо. По: I get it, okay. I'll try to arrange a place for you in the basement.
Эйрик (обычное лицо)_(Пора возвращаться: (Time to get back to the workbench.)
Системное_Продолжение ветки с Рокси в сл:
See more of the Roxy plot part in the upcoming versions! 
Stay tuned! Love, FoxTailTale!
Системное_Сегодня вы уже дарили подарок!: You already gave a gift today!
Эйрик(норма)_Смотри, что я для тебя нашё: Look what I found for you!
